visual_description:
A close-up, shaky shot captures a chaotic scene in a dark, wooden structure. The audio is a chaotic and intense soundscape of a magical battle. It begins with a series of sharp, crackling, and zapping noises, like sparks being thrown. A figure, partially obscured by shadow, is at the center of the action. They are surrounded by a flurry of bright orange sparks and flashes of light, suggesting a magical duel or an explosion. The background is a blur of dark wooden beams and debris, illuminated only by the intense, fleeting lights from the conflict. In the top right corner, the white Chinese characters "风行网" are visible. The camera work is frantic and unsteady, enhancing the sense of danger and action.

The camera pulls back to a wide, high-angle shot, revealing the full context of the scene. The action takes place at night on a long, dark wooden trestle bridge that stretches across a deep, dark chasm. The bridge is part of a larger, gothic-style building complex visible in the distant background. The figure from the previous shot is now seen as a small, bright point of light moving rapidly along the bridge. Another similar light source, possibly an opponent, is also visible further down the bridge. The
